svg.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
svg.text: nanoESP32-C6 · Waveshare 7.5" e-Paper HAT (B) · INMP441 mic · MAX98357A DAC + speaker · push-button

g.text: ⚠ VCC must be 3.3 V — never 5 V
• GPIO8 — onboard WS2812B RGB status LED (driven by the ESPHome `light` component)
• GPIO9 — BOOT button on the board itself
GPIO1, GPIO10, GPIO11, GPIO12, GPIO13, GPIO15, RX, TX
Both USB-C ports accept 5 V — top = CH343 (flash/serial), bottom = native USB (wall power).
